# Allrecipes-pp-cli Build Log

## Generated by the machine
- Foundation (root.go, config.go, doctor.go, store, cliutil, cache, client) — Surf TLS-impersonated transport via `http_transport: browser-chrome` in spec.
- Two endpoints from spec resources: `recipes search` (HTML scrape) and `recipes get` (HTML scrape).
- Standard subcommands: profile, feedback, which, export, import, sync, agent-context, workflow, version.
- 5 standard README sections present (Quick Start, Agent Usage, Health Check, Troubleshooting, Unique Features).
- 7 quality gates passed on first generation.

## Hand-built (Priority 0 + Priority 1 + Priority 2)
- `internal/recipes/jsonld.go` — ported verbatim from recipe-goat. Parses every Schema.org Recipe JSON-LD field across the @graph / array / single-object shapes.
- `internal/recipes/search.go` — Allrecipes-specific search/category result-card parser. Extracts URL, recipeId, slug, title, image, rating, reviewCount per card. Includes `CanonicalRecipeURL`, `ResolveRecipeURL`, `ParseURL` helpers.
- `internal/recipes/ingredients.go` — ingredient string parser (qty/unit/name with mixed fractions, unicode fractions, and a units list), `ScaleIngredients`, `AggregateGrocery`, `FormatTime`.
- `internal/recipes/ranking.go` — Bayesian smoothing and result ranking.
- `internal/recipes/fetch.go` — bridge between client.Get and the parsers (FetchRecipe, FetchSearch, FetchCategoryHTML, FetchHTML).
- `internal/recipes/localstore.go` — SQLite extensions: `recipe_ingredients` denormalization, `recipe_ingredients_fts` FTS5, `recipe_index` scalar index. Plus `IndexQuery`, `PantryQuery`, `CountRecipes`, `ClearCache`.
- `internal/cli/cmd_helpers.go` — shared helpers (`fetchAndCache`, `renderJSON`, `recipeMarkdown`, `openStoreForCommand`).
- `internal/cli/cmd_recipe.go` — top-level `recipe`, `ingredients`, `instructions`, `nutrition`, `reviews`, `scale`, `export-recipe`.
- `internal/cli/cmd_search.go` — top-level `search`, `top-rated`, `quick`.
- `internal/cli/cmd_pantry.go` — `pantry`, `with-ingredient`, `dietary` (with 6 dietary heuristics: gluten-free, vegan, vegetarian, low-carb, dairy-free, keto).
- `internal/cli/cmd_cookbook.go` — `cookbook`, `grocery-list`.
- `internal/cli/cmd_browse.go` — `category`, `cuisine`, `ingredient`, `occasion` browse commands.
- `internal/cli/cmd_fetch.go` — `article`, `gallery`, `cook` for non-recipe Allrecipes pages.
- `internal/cli/cmd_cache.go` — `cache stats`, `cache list`, `cache clear`.
- `internal/cli/recipes_get.go` — REPLACED. Generated link-mode HTML extract → JSON-LD parse + cache.
- `internal/cli/recipes_search.go` — REPLACED. Generic `extractHTMLResponse(Mode: "links")` → Allrecipes-specific search-card parser.
- `internal/cli/doctor.go` — patched. Stdlib HTTP probe → Surf-transport probe with explicit Cloudflare interstitial detection. Removed the dead auth-credentials block (no-auth CLI).
- `internal/cli/auth.go` — REMOVED. The spec declares `auth.type: none`; an `auth set-token / auth status / auth logout` command is dead UI.
- `internal/cli/root.go` — registered all 23 new top-level commands; removed `newAuthCmd` registration.

## Total surface
- Top-level commands: **27** (22 hand-written + 5 generated/standard scaffolding the user actually uses: doctor, sync, export, import, profile).
- Subcommands: cache list/stats/clear, recipes search/get, plus profile/feedback/workflow trees.
- Schema.org Recipe JSON-LD fields exposed: 14 (name, author, image, recipeIngredient, recipeInstructions, prepTime, cookTime, totalTime, recipeYield, aggregateRating, nutrition, datePublished, description, keywords, recipeCategory, recipeCuisine).

## Live verification (during build, not Phase 4)
- `search brownies --limit 3 --agent` → 3 clean results with title + URL
- `recipe https://www.allrecipes.com/recipe/9599/quick-and-easy-brownies/ --agent --select name,recipeIngredient,totalTime,aggregateRating` → fully parsed JSON-LD: 10 ingredients, totalTime=1800s, rating 4.7/2040 reviews
- `scale 9599/quick-and-easy-brownies --servings 32 --agent` → factor=2 with all 10 ingredients correctly doubled
- `doctor --json` → `api: reachable (via browser-chrome transport)`, `auth: not required`

## Tests
- 61 tests across 11 packages — all passing
- `go vet ./...` clean
- `go fmt ./...` applied (3 files reformatted by lefthook)
- `go build` clean

## Intentionally deferred
- Apify-style article body text extraction is best-effort only (heavy templating; not worth a full HTML parser pipeline). Documented in `article` command's --help.
- Per-review text scraping (the public Recipe schema does not expose per-review text; only aggregate rating + count). Documented in `reviews` command's --help.
- "Reading recipe-goat's `internal/recipes/store.go`" — not needed; we use a denormalized table-set scoped to allrecipes-pp-cli.

## Generator gaps surfaced
- Generated `doctor` uses stdlib HTTP — fails cleanly against Cloudflare-fronted sites with no actionable diagnosis. Patched per-CLI; would benefit from a generator-level option to use the configured transport.
- Generated HTML-extract mode `links` produces raw HTML in the `name` field instead of clean text. For real-world site scraping, the generated `recipes search` is replaced with hand-written parsing every time.
- Auth subcommand is unconditionally generated even when `auth.type: none`. The user is expected to delete `auth.go` and unregister it. Could be skipped at generation time when no auth.

These are noted for retro consideration; none blocked this build.
